restaurant_openings.name: SF’s Most Exciting New Pop-Up Celebrates Open-Air Asian Street Food Markets
restaurant_openings.summary: There’s a new pop-up celebrating open-air Asian food courts, known as dai pai dongs, in San Francisco. Dai Pai Dai Lo is the project of Vincent Yu, a young chef working at the popular Four Kings in Chinatown.
